title: Febreze Air Freshener Spray LAVENDER 185ml x 4 | Odour Eliminator with OdourClear Technology | Non-Flammable, Long-Lasting Room Freshener

🌸 Soothing Lavender Fragrance – Calming floral scent helps relax your space naturally

description: Bring calm to your space with Febreze Air Freshener Spray Lavender 185ml . This bundle includes 4 sprays that use advanced OdourClear technology to eliminate odours at their source – not just mask them. Enjoy the gentle, soothing aroma of fresh lavender in every spray. Why choose Febreze? Includes 4 x 185ml sprays – great value and long-lasting use Neutralises tough, lingering odours (pets, cooking, mustiness) Gentle lavender scent – creates a relaxing home environment Propellant-free, non-flammable, safe to spray daily Perfect for bathrooms, kitchens, living rooms, or offices Febreze – Breathe happy.
